title: Desktop view from mobile phone
excerpt:
The mobile version of the app has some limited functionalities, for example, it’s important for us to have a Timeline view for a year.

posts.author: Domyx (Kris)
posts.cookedHtml:
The mobile version of the app has some limited functionalities, for example, it’s important for us to have a Timeline view for a year.

Has anybody managed to view Monday.com on mobile phone as a desktop version? I would not mind it being a bit clumsy.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
To have the desktop version on a mobile device, open monday.com and in your browser settings, select “Desktop site” or a similar feature for your browser. The attached image is from Chrome

Screenshot_20220707-164642_Chrome1080×2280 198 KB

posts.author: Domyx (Kris)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, Monday is smarter than that, but thank you.
